Health Care Select Sector Index Swap

holdings.infoBox: CURE is an equity ETF with a total of 70 individual holdings. The top holdings are Eli Lilly and Company stock at 11.67%, Goldman Finl Sq Trsry Inst 506 at 10.30%, Dreyfus Govt Cash Man Ins at 10.04%, Goldman Sachs Fin Gov 465 Institut at 7.92%, and Johnson & Johnson at 7.54%.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily Healthcare Bull 3X ETF (CURE) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Health Care Select Sector index. The fund provides 3x levered exposure to a market cap weighted sub-index of the S&P 500 that tracks the performance of US listed health care companies. CURE was launched on Jun 15, 2011 and is issued by Direxion.

data.title: Jablonski: Biotech presents a good buying opportunity
data.text: Sylvia Jablonski of Direxion discusses why biotech stocks and ETFs are attractive right now, due to their cheapness relative to the rest of the market.
